name: Indian Oil Marketing (IOC/BPCL/HPCL)
summary: Day 61 Tuesday — BRANCH 3 THESIS FALSIFIED IN OIL TAPE; CHABAHAR ESCAPE HATCH CLOSING; OMC FORCED-CHOICE WINDOW DAY 15-16. CRITICAL CORRECTION: yesterday's $100.47 Brent print was a yfinance contract-roll glitch. Live tape Mon $108.23 (+2.75%) / Tue $109.39 (+1.08%) — oil REVERSED UP, not down. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]

current.brent_futures: $100.47/bbl Sunday Globex / Monday Asia (-4.6% gap-down — Branch 3 confirmed)
current.structural_losses: ~₹20/L petrol + ~₹100/L diesel; pump prices frozen ~4 years
current.retail_fuel_prices: petrol ₹94.77/L Delhi, diesel ₹87.67/L Delhi, petrol ₹103.54/L Mumbai (Goodreturns/V3Cars Sunday-Monday)
current.rbi_special_credit_facility: ACTIVE ~2 weeks (since ~April 13-15) — RBI instructed IOC/HPCL/BPCL to curb spot USD buying and use special credit facilities for dollar needs (Reuters via MarketScreener India + ORF)
current.iranian_crude_supply: IOC Jaya 2M bbl + Reliance Felicity 2M bbl discharged before April 19 waiver expiry. No further Iranian purchases planned.
current.waiver_status: Iran waiver lapsed April 19. Russian 30-day waiver extension preserves ~1.9 mbpd Russian flow.
current.omc_usd_demand: ~$250-300M daily; now routed through RBI-administered credit windows rather than spot market
current.ppac_signal: PPAC publishing daily international crude rates — Economic Times read as preparation tell for fuel-price pass-through
current.monday_cash_open_expected: IOC/BPCL/HPCL +1.5-3% on diesel margin recovery (Branch 3 base case)
current.government_forced_choice: 30-day window (by 2026-05-27): (a) raise pump prices, (b) fiscal subsidy ~₹2,800 cr/week, (c) Iran-rupee oil track via Chabahar, (d) wait for Brent normalisation

active_triggers.condition: Government instructs OMCs to freeze fuel prices despite $110+ oil
OMC fuel-price pass-through announced OR Iran-rupee oil track via Chabahar restart within 30 days (by 2026-05-27)
